'''âsh-ch-f-b''' ('''kashachfeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calligraph|calligraph]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-ch-f-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calligraph|calligraph]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-ch-f-b
|-
! Lemma
| kashachfeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishachfeboko|thishachfeboko]] || [[word:jishachfeboko|jishachfeboko]] || [[word:shishachfeboko|shishachfeboko]] || [[word:kishachfeboko|kishachfeboko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshachfeboko|thoshachfeboko]] || [[word:joshachfeboko|joshachfeboko]] || [[word:shoshachfeboko|shoshachfeboko]] || [[word:koshachfeboko|koshachfeboko]]
|-

|-
